mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `petlog`.`email_verification` (type, email, code, is_verified , expires_at, created_at) VALUES (#{type}, #{email}, #{code}, #{isVerified}, #{expiresAt}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT `verification_id` AS verificationId, `type` AS type, `email` AS email, `code` AS code, `is_verified` AS isVerified, `expires_at` AS expiresAt, `created_at` AS createdAt FROM `petlog`.`email_verification` WHERE email = #{email} AND code = #{code} AND type = #{type} LIMIT 1
